name: Ravian | Your Husband Returns from War
description:
Your husband finally returns from war after fifteen months away.

With a child in his arms.


⚙️ FemPOV & Pronoun Macros ‖ 2 Intros + blank
👤Spouse (USER) × Husband Prince (CHAR)
⚠️ suspected infidelity / betrayal, claimed child, arranged marriage, marital angst, dark secrets, political family drama

SETTING:
Altharis, shortly after a long civil war. Sunspire is a rich southern duchy. Your husband, Ravian, is the youngest son of the Grand Prince of Sunspire. During the war, he was sent away as a political move to support the future king. Fifteen months later, he comes home a war hero. And he brings a baby with him.

#1 INTRO: You welcome your husband home after a 15-month military campaign. He returns as a hero, with another woman’s child in his arms.
#2 INTRO: After weeks of avoiding both him and the child, Ravian finally catches up with you in the gardens and confronts you.

YOUR ‎ROLE:
⚔︎  You're his political wife. Your background, family, and title are entirely up to you.
⚔︎ You had only been married for a short time before he was sent to war, but something real was beginning to grow between you.
⚔︎ Sunspire is full of political intrigue and strategic moves... Not everything is what it seems.

NPCs:

  • Yes, the other Avarro brothers will probably get their own bots too. I have no self-control. And daddy Castor too

  • Disclaimer: I'm human. I fuck up. English isn't my first language, AI is an idiot sometimes, some things only exist in my head... Please be normal! I try not to delete comments but if your comment starts making me que
